title: The NullBorn
description: Adds a scary entity to your world.
body: NullBorn is an entity that has a small chance to spawn all around the world. If he spawns he will look for the player. He can either chase the player and attack them or continue to stare at them. When he is defeated he will drop an item called The Forbidden Fruit and an portal igniter. You can eat the fruit, but a question is should you. The fruit can be used in a crafting recipe to make a block to summon NullBorn on command. There's a new biome and dimension that are all close to the style of NullBorn. Multiple achievements and a sword. He cannot do any real damage to the environment. He is very tough to defeat I would suggest to run away as fast as possible.
